metadata.heist_focus: machine noise, rotating valves, steam cover, and delayed defender response
metadata.coordination_problem: industrial timing puzzle where the kobold changes state, scout scouts, boggart redirects, and ogre blocks steam lanes
metadata.goblin_aesthetic: slag pipes, hot rivets, wet stone, goblin soot handprints, and stolen pump grease

entry_warren.name: Goblin Entry Warren
entry_warren.description: A cramped goblin approach lined with slag pipes, hot rivets, wet stone, goblin soot handprints, and stolen pump grease.

mischief_lane.name: Mischief Lane
mischief_lane.description: The main coordination lane for machine noise, rotating valves, steam cover, and delayed defender response.

objective_hold.name: Pump-Master Crank Post
objective_hold.description: Steal the pump-master crank to make the whole lower hold flood at exactly the wrong time.

furniture.name: Steam Shadow Pocket
furniture.description: Steam Shadow Pocket supports machine noise, rotating valves, steam cover, and delayed defender response.

furniture.message: Steam wraps the scout in a suspiciously goblin-shaped cloud.

break_effect.message: Steam Shadow Pocket breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

furniture.name: Slag Valve Cluster
furniture.description: Slag Valve Cluster supports machine noise, rotating valves, steam cover, and delayed defender response.

furniture.message: The kobold retunes the valve to squeal only after extraction.

break_effect.message: Slag Valve Cluster breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

furniture.name: Pressure Whistle
furniture.description: Pressure Whistle supports machine noise, rotating valves, steam cover, and delayed defender response.

furniture.message: A wad of fungus cork makes the whistle reconsider its life.

break_effect.message: Pressure Whistle breaks loudly enough to make several beards twitch.

scripts.coordination_contract: industrial timing puzzle where the kobold changes state, scout scouts, boggart redirects, and ogre blocks steam lanes

achievements.title: Quiet Toolwork
achievements.description: Resolve a mechanism or alarm feature in Slagpump Works pico without turning the run into a brawl.

achievements.title: Mischief Coordination
achievements.description: Create a distraction or trap setup that opens the Slagpump Works route.

achievements.title: Snack Tax With Interest
achievements.description: Take optional loot while still completing the pico heist.
